reference: Hello. This is most likely a cyst of the cord, but this is usually painless. Another possibility is that this is a sebaceous cyst. It is better to undergo ultrasonography to confirm what it is and consider surgery to remove the swelling and confirm the diagnosis.
text: Hello, this is most likely a cyst of the cord, but this is usually painless. Another possibility is that this is a sebaceous cyst; it is better to undergo ultrasonography to confirm what it is, and consider surgery to remove the swelling and confirm the diagnosis.
